session_plan: Kingdom Kids Academy — Next Session Priority

PRIORITY_1_animated_visual_learn_mode.what: Transform Learn mode from text-only to animated + visual + voice

animated_number_line.desc: HTML/CSS number line 0-20 (expandable) that draws dynamically
features: Arcs animate one by one above the line with +1 labels
Voice narrates EACH jump in sync: '6... 7... 8!'
For subtraction: arcs go from small to big (count up)
For multiplication: bigger arcs showing skip counting (+3, +3, +3)
Speed: ~800ms per jump so child can follow

visual_groups.desc: Emoji groups that appear for multiplication/division
features: 3 × 4: Three groups of 4 stars appear one group at a time
Voice counts: 'Group 1: 4. Group 2: 4 plus 4 is 8. Group 3: 8 plus 4 is 12!'
Division: items deal out one by one to groups

step_by_step_column.desc: For double-digit: show stacking method animated
features: Numbers stack on top of each other
Ones column highlights, adds, shows carry
Tens column highlights, adds with carry

per_operation_visuals.addition_to_10: Number line 0-10, jump arcs, count on from bigger
per_operation_visuals.addition_to_20: Number line 0-20, jump arcs, count on from bigger
per_operation_visuals.subtraction_to_10: Number line 0-10, jump arcs counting UP from smaller
per_operation_visuals.subtraction_to_20: Number line 0-20, jump arcs counting UP from smaller
per_operation_visuals.addition_to_100: Stacking column method animated (ones then tens)
per_operation_visuals.subtraction_to_100: Stacking column method with borrow animation
per_operation_visuals.multiplication_1_10: Groups of emoji appearing + repeated addition shown
per_operation_visuals.division_1_10: Items dealing out to groups one by one
per_operation_visuals.double_digit_multiply: Break apart visual: 14×3 = (10×3) + (4×3) shown side by side
per_operation_visuals.double_digit_divide: Break apart: 84÷4 = (80÷4) + (4÷4) shown side by side
per_operation_visuals.fractions: Shape dividing into equal parts, coloring portions
per_operation_visuals.time: Animated clock face with hands moving

PRIORITY_2_improve_hints_with_visuals.what: Practice mode hints should ALSO use the animated number line
PRIORITY_2_improve_hints_with_visuals.flow: Child taps hint → number line animates inside the hint box → voice narrates

PRIORITY_3_kid_friendly_subtopic_names.what: Rename all subtopics to child-friendly names

examples.Count Up to Subtract: Count Up to Find the Answer!

decisions_confirmed_this_session.addition_strategy: ALWAYS Count On from bigger number (never Make 10 as primary)
decisions_confirmed_this_session.both_grades_same_content: Anu learns same as Dominion, 2G gets extra double/triple digit

remaining_after_visuals: PWA with service worker for offline
Possible voice input for answers (say the answer instead of tap)

PRIORITY_0_consolidation.what: Academy becomes THE ONE APP — everything moves into it
steps: 1. Move Math Competition code INTO Academy (new tab/screen)
2. Move Voice Math Tutor INTO Academy (merge with Practice mode voice)
3. Build unified dashboard: Learn progress + Practice scores + Competition results
4. Remove from Hub: Times Tables (DONE), Voice Math, eventually Competition
5. Academy bottom nav becomes: Learn • Practice • Compete • Dashboard
6. Eventually retire Kingdom-Math Hub entirely — Academy IS the hub
7. Add Break Time (in minutes) setting to Competition parent dashboard
keep_from_competition: A/B/C voice options with 'final answer' confirmation
done_this_session: Added Academy as featured #1 card on Hub
